text.p: Thank you for this mail. I beleive that and are doing fine in school. is now in . He got there yesterday morning. Thanks for the prayers. Indeed the Lord is good and He answers our prayers. What are you doing to keep yourself busy? I am planning to proceed on leave to by God's grace 3rd of November. would finish by then.
I love UUU. Greetings to your husband and children.

I bless God for the good news. The Lord will continue to keep divine doors open for His children. I wish you and the entire family a wonderful stay there. I hope the kids are adjusting well. It could be quite challenging especially with the language barrier at the initial time, but I trust the Lord will sustain them. How are you settling down?

We are doing fine by God's grace. I am still at the University of (Department of ) as research associate, It is a term position and the Lord has been faithful in sustaining me but I am trusting the Lord for something more permanent.
My regards to your husband. , (and ) also send greetings their friends. I wonder if they will still be able to recognise each other again.

Bless you dear Sister....always correct! I just spoke with , they are in for some meetings. Unfortunately I may not be able to see them because I am going home to tomorrow. C'est la vie..that's life. Mo ku aigbagebe..my French comes back once in a while.
Stay blessed and love to you all.
